title: Salty Crumbly Tomato Crumble
description: A cozy Brazilian dish featuring a mixture of salty tomato puree and crumbly topping that is egg-free-friendly.

ingredients.name: Almond Meal or Ground Almonds
ingredients.notes: As a crumbly base for the topping

ingredients.name: Pecorino Cheese
ingredients.notes: For adding a bit of sharpness to the dish

ingredients.name: Sunflower Seeds or Pignoli Nuts
ingredients.notes: For texture and crunch in the topping

instructions: In a bowl, mix tomato puree with coarse salt until well combined.
Fold through olive oil, almond meal, pecorino cheese, and sunflower seeds or pignoli nuts. Stir until the mixture is smooth and crumbly.
Transfer the tomato-crust base to an oven-safe dish. Bake for 10 minutes until golden brown and crispy.
Let it cool slightly before serving warm with additional toppings if desired.
